title: 7.2.15 Preemptive Toe Crushing
content:
7.2.15 Preemptive Toe Crushing
n this form of damage, compression at the toe causes
rushing without significant ductile response, such as
ocking. There are no reported experimental
bservations of such behavior.
The FEMA 273 equation for toe crushing is used. Post-
crack displacement capacity is assumed to be negligible.
